Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing For Entry Of Default Judgment As Against Defendent John Dampeer
Off Calendar Mar-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Alexa R. Burakoff.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Michael Heath, Esq. appeared with plaintiff MIchael Fusaro, who was placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by defendant John Dampeer.
Default was entered against defendant John Dampeer on January 18, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, March 15, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Michael Fusaro, and against the Defaulted Defendant John Dampeer, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $16,450.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $481.50.
Costs - $505.00.
Cleaning/Restoration Costs: $2,000.00.
Total - $19,436.50.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
